title: The falen entity
description: Evil World: Last Dawn — a horror survival experience where an ancient entity, banished from a parallel universe, awakens in your world. All life is gone. Only you remain — and it wants you dead.
body:
Once, there was a being older than worlds themselves — a shapeless, ancient force known only as The Devourer.
It consumed realities, bending entire universes to its will. Nothing could stop it — until something far stronger appeared.

That greater entity, unseen and beyond comprehension, struck it down and cast its broken essence into our world.
Now The Devourer awakens once more — weakened, fragmented, and furious.

It cannot return to its full power on its own.
So it takes on new forms, manipulates the environment, twists the shadows…
and uses us — the last remaining humans — as the fuel for its resurrection.

Every step you take, every breath, every flicker of light… it senses it all.
And with every moment, it grows stronger.

You are not its enemy.
You are its resource.

Survive. Hide. Explore the ruins of a dead world.
Because the ancient force is watching — and it wants what was taken from it.
